title: [MooreToCore] Emit error for unsupported module port types

features.name: queue type as module port
features.description: Code should include a module with a queue-typed port (queue of integers with specified size)
features.snippet: module foo(input queue int unsigned [$:10] q_port); endmodule

features.name: string type as module port
features.description: Code should include a module with a string-typed input or output port

features.name: unsupported type conversion in module port
features.description: Code should include a module port with a type that cannot be converted to hardware type

extraction_summary.note: Issue contains only MLIR test code, not pure SV. Features extracted represent the SV type constructs (queue/string module ports) that would trigger the underlying C++ conversion bug.
